scenarios.title: Home Page Display
scenarios.expected: Homepage loads with heading 'Welcome to the-internet', subheading 'Available Examples', and a list of links.

scenarios.title: Checkboxes Page Rendering
scenarios.expected: At least two selectable checkboxes are displayed without errors.

scenarios.title: Login Successful Authentication
scenarios.expected: User is redirected to a secure page without errors.

scenarios.title: Dropdown Selection
steps: Select an option from the dropdown
scenarios.expected: The selected option is displayed correctly.

scenarios.title: File Upload Functionality
steps: Navigate to the file upload page
scenarios.expected: File uploads successfully and a confirmation message is shown.
